dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7154 IH: Streamlining Small Business Contracts Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Cisneros (for himself and Ms. Velázquez) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Small Business

form.official-title: To amend the Small Business Act to modify the dollar threshold for certain sole source contracts, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Streamlining Small Business Contracts Act of 2026.

section.header: Amendments to sole source contracting authority for certain small business concerns
section.text: The Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 631 et seq.) is amended—

paragraph.text: in section 8(a)(1)(D)(i)(II), by striking $7,000,000 and all that follows and inserting $10,000,000.;

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (7)(B), by striking will not exceed and all that follows and inserting will not exceed $10,000,000; and; and
in paragraph (8)(B), by striking will not exceed and all that follows and inserting will not exceed $10,000,000; and;

paragraph.text: in section 31(c)(2)(A)(ii) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 657a(c)(2)(A)(ii)), by striking will not exceed and all that follows and inserting will not exceed $10,000,000; and; and
in section 36(c)(2) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 657f(c)(2)), by striking will not exceed and all that follows and inserting will not exceed $10,000,000; and.
